ul.li: ΣX = sum of all X chunks across GPUs

g.text: Initial State: Each GPU holds full data array, split into n chunks
Chunk Assignment: GPU i owns chunk (i+1) mod n for reduction
Step 1: Send chunk (rank-1) to neighbor, accumulate received chunk
Step 2: Continue around ring (n-1=3 total steps for n=4 GPUs)
Scatter-Reduce Result: Each GPU has fully reduced ONE chunk
Step 1: Send fully reduced chunk to neighbor
Final State: All GPUs have complete reduced data

div.p: Total data transferred per GPU: 2(n-1)/n × data_size Phase 1 (Scatter-Reduce): (n-1) × (data_size/n) Phase 2 (All-Gather): (n-1) × (data_size/n) Total: 2(n-1)/n × data_size As n → ∞: approaches 2 × data_size (constant!)
